# Allow Portal Users to access internal messages

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This feature allows for some Portal users to see internal messages.

This can be useful, for example, for external representatives
that work together with internal users, and need to collaborate with them.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

In the User form, Portal Users have available two checkboxes:

- "See own company Internal Messages"
- "See other company Internal Messages"

These allow the Portal User to see
the internal messages in documents related to his parent company, or
the internal messages in documents related to other companies
that are not his parent company, or both.

methods.name: odoo.addons.mail_allow_portal_internal_note.controllers.mail.PortalChatterExt.portal_chatter_post
documentation:
Create a new `mail.message` with the given `message` and/or
`attachment_ids` and redirect the user to the newly created message.

The message will be associated to the record `res_id` of the model
`res_model`. The user must have access rights on this target document or
must provide valid identifiers through `kw`. See `_message_post_helper`.
No extension hooks available to avoid it.
Copy of all the original code, and add the is_log_note support
